requirement_topic.en: ST Certificate of Approval and SIRIM route with in-country importer/registrant
requirement_topic.zh: ST批准证书与SIRIM路径，需在地进口商登记
requirement_topic.zht: ST批准證書與SIRIM路徑，需在地進口商登記

summary.en: Refrigerators entering Malaysia are commonly handled through ST and SIRIM processes for regulated electrical products. An in-country importer or registrant is expected to hold relevant responsibility for Malaysia-facing filings, CoA linkage, and SIRIM product evidence handling before shipment placement and retail entry.
summary.zh: 进入马来西亚的冰箱通常按ST与SIRIM流程处理受管制电气产品。通常由在马来西亚的进口商或备案方负责完成面向马来西亚的申报、ST CoA衔接和SIRIM证据提交，才能进入销售和仓储链条。
summary.zht: 進入馬來西亞的冰箱通常按ST與SIRIM流程處理受管制電氣產品。通常由在馬來西亞的進口商或登記方負責完成面向馬來西亞的申報、ST CoA銜接和SIRIM證據提交，方能進入銷售與倉儲鏈條。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) implementation for regulated electrical products
SIRIM QAS Malaysia conformity route for imported electrical appliances

summary.en: China uses CCC and GB 4706.13 / GB 12021.2 documentation for domestic and export administration where applicable. These are useful technical records but do not replace Malaysia CoA + SIRIM destination compliance pathways that require Malaysia-resident process ownership.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用CCC体系与GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2文件支撑国内及出口管理。其作用更多是技术资料基础，不能替代马来西亚需要在地负责人推动的ST CoA与SIRIM合格评定路径。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用CCC體系與GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2文件支撐國內及出口管理。其作用更多是技術資料基礎，不能替代馬來西亞需要在地負責人推動的ST CoA與SIRIM合格評定路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Household electrical safety and construction baseline in China
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) process where applicable

gap.en: The core gap is process ownership. Chinese certificates are usually exporter-side records and are not a substitute for a Malaysia-linked importer filing package. Exporters should ensure the destination importer can be named, documented, and able to submit or respond to ST/SIRIM checks before shipment launch.
gap.zh: 核心差距在于过程归属。中国证书大多为出口商侧资料，不能替代由马来西亚进口方承担的在地申报链条。出口前应确认目的地进口商可被明确登记并有能力提交/响应ST与SIRIM查验。
gap.zht: 核心差距在於過程歸屬。中國證書大多為出口商側資料，不能替代由馬來西亞進口方承擔的在地申報鏈。出貨前應確認目的地進口商可被明確登記並有能力提交/回應ST與SIRIM查驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory pathway for destination placement when ST/SIRIM scope applies, including Malaysia-based registrant responsibility and CoA-linked documentation.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China where CCC applies, but not equivalent to destination Malaysian market-placement proof.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese compliance packages are strong technical inputs but Malaysia market entry still depends on destination importer filings, CoA-link closure, and SIRIM route ownership. Confirm importer authority and ST/SIRIM scope before launch to avoid post-shipment closure delays.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国技术包是有力输入，但马来西亚市场准入仍取决于目的地进口商文件链、ST批准衔接和SIRIM流程归属。应在起运前确认进口方责任主体和ST/SIRIM适用范围，避免到港后补件延误。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國技術包是有力輸入，但馬來西亞市場准入仍取決於目的地進口商文件鏈、ST批准銜接與SIRIM流程歸屬。應在起運前確認進口方責任主體和ST/SIRIM適用範圍，避免到港後補件延誤。

requirement_topic.en: Import clearance and routing through Port Klang / Tanjung Pelepas
requirement_topic.zh: 以巴生港/丹绒帕拉塞清关和报检路由
requirement_topic.zht: 以巴生港/丹絨帕拉塞清關和報檢路由

summary.en: Malaysia logistics routing for these imports commonly uses Port Klang and Tanjung Pelepas as main controlled points for goods. Documentation must be aligned to Malaysia customs and regulator-linked checks before release, and destination-side compliance references should be attached in the customs packet and technical annexes.
summary.zh: 马来西亚出口路径下，进口常见进入点包括巴生港和丹绒巴鲁拉塞。到港文件需与海关和监管机构联动要求闭环，并在报关技术附件中包含目的地合规引用和型号文件。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞進口路徑下，報關常見進口點包括巴生港和丹絨白剌謝。到港文件需與海關及監管聯動要求閉環，並在報關技術附件中包含目的地合規引用和機型文件。

standards_or_laws: Malaysia customs clearance flow for regulated electrical goods
Destination documentation requirements for ST/SIRIM-related products

summary.en: China export customs and logistics channels have their own documentation model and are not a direct substitute for Malaysia entry points or route-linked regulatory packet structure. China-based clearance does not complete Malaysia destination clearance obligations.
summary.zh: 中国出口报关链路是国内文件体系，不能直接替代马来西亚港口与目的地监管文件结构。中国国内放行合规不能自动满足马来西亚入境的清关闭环要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口報關鏈路是國內文件體系，不能直接替代馬來西亞港口與目的地監管文件結構。中國國內放行合規不能自動滿足馬來西亞入境的清關閉環要求。

standards_or_laws: China domestic logistics and customs declaration documents

gap.en: The gap is not only tariff and customs code, but route governance. A model ready on paper in China may still stall in Malaysia if port packet, authority-linked endorsements, and importer-side compliance ownership are incomplete for Port Klang or Tanjung Pelepas.
gap.zh: 差距不只是税号和报关编码，更是路线治理。中国端文件齐全的型号仍可能在马来西亚受阻，若Port Klang或Tanjung Pelepas的文件包、监管衔接、进口方责任未提前闭合。
gap.zht: 差距不只是稅號和報關編碼，更是路線治理。中國端文件齊全的機型仍可能在馬來西亞受阻，若Port Klang或Tanjung Pelepas的文件包、監管銜接、進口方責任未提前閉合。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for practical market placement when regulated electrical product shipments are routed through Malaysia customs and authority-linked entry points.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic export logistics as applicable, but not equivalent to Malaysia customs clearance package completeness.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Destination logistics closure is a separate checklist. Chinese export-ready status should be considered baseline evidence only. For Malaysia, align the packet to Port Klang/Tanjung Pelepas flow requirements and destination agency expectations with a named local importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 目的地物流闭环是独立清单。中国出口端状态可作为基础资料，但马来西亚需按Port Klang/Tanjung Pelepas流程和监管机关预期补齐进口方相关文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 目的地物流閉環是獨立清單。中國出口端狀態可作為基礎資料，但馬來西亞需按Port Klang/Tanjung Pelepas流程和監管機關預期補齊進口方相關文件。
